metadata.description: Held-out set of AI-typical RQ phrasings outside the WP01-WP20 surface forms (and outside the four in-prompt off-list examples), plus specialist-written hard negatives. Ground truth for the RUNTIME LLM judge of the Socratic wording-pattern advisory — not for the offline regex detector (that is evals/gold/rq_framing_patterns/).
metadata.language: English-only (AI-typical phrasing is language-specific; see PR #468 discussion)

tiers.family_variant: shell whose meaning belongs to a listed WP family but whose surface form differs (interrogative or synonym-verb rewording); tier is descriptive metadata, label is the ground truth
tiers.off_list: shell matching no listed family (decorated compound titles, novel frames)
